---
title: "dbt-fusion Issue Health"
subtitle: "Actionable metrics for dbt-labs/dbt-fusion (excludes EPICs)"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: darkly
    scrolling: true
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/dataders/fusion_issue_analysis
execute:
  echo: false
---

<script>window.__quartoRequireDefine = window.define; window.define = undefined;</script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/vega@6"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/vega-lite@6"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/vega-embed@7"></script>
<script>window.define = window.__quartoRequireDefine; delete window.__quartoRequireDefine;</script>

```{python}
#| include: false
import json
import os
import uuid

import duckdb
import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import HTML

PROJECT_ROOT = os.path.abspath(os.path.join(os.path.dirname("__file__"), "../.."))
DB_PATH = (
    os.environ["FUSION_DB"]
    if os.environ.get("FUSION_DB")
    else "md:fusion_issues"
    if os.environ.get("MOTHERDUCK_TOKEN")
    else os.path.join(PROJECT_ROOT, "data", "fusion_issues.duckdb")
)

PALETTE = {
    "bug": "#f38ba8",
    "enhancement": "#89b4fa",
    "other": "#a6adc8",
    "opened": "#f38ba8",
    "closed": "#a6e3a1",
    "p25": "#a6e3a1",
    "p50": "#89b4fa",
    "p75": "#f38ba8",
}


def query(sql: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    con = duckdb.connect(DB_PATH, read_only=True)
    if not DB_PATH.startswith("md:"):
        file_search_root = os.environ.get("FUSION_PROJECT_ROOT", PROJECT_ROOT)
        con.execute(f"SET file_search_path = '{os.path.join(file_search_root, 'transform')}'")
    df = con.execute(sql).fetchdf()
    con.close()
    return df


def chart(spec: dict) -> HTML:
    element_id = f"vl-{uuid.uuid4().hex}"
    spec.setdefault("height", 280)
    spec.setdefault("background", "transparent")
    spec.setdefault("config", {})
    spec["config"].setdefault("axis", {"labelColor": "#ced4da", "titleColor": "#ced4da", "gridColor": "#343a40"})
    spec["config"].setdefault("legend", {"labelColor": "#ced4da", "titleColor": "#ced4da"})
    spec["config"].setdefault("title", {"color": "#f8f9fa"})
    spec_json = json.dumps(spec, default=str)
    return HTML(
        f'<div id="{element_id}"></div>'
        f"<script>(function render() {{"
        f"if (window.vegaEmbed) {{ vegaEmbed('#{element_id}', {spec_json}, "
        f"{{actions: false, theme: 'dark'}}); return; }}"
        f"setTimeout(render, 50);"
        f"}})();</script>"
    )


def records(df: pd.DataFrame) -> list[dict]:
    return json.loads(df.to_json(orient="records", date_format="iso"))


summary = query("SELECT * FROM summary_kpis").iloc[0]
cum_flow = query("SELECT * FROM cumulative_flow")
velocity = query("SELECT * FROM velocity")
resp = query("SELECT * FROM response_pctiles")
age_dist = query("SELECT * FROM age_distribution")
lbl = query("SELECT * FROM close_by_label ORDER BY median_days_to_close DESC")
triage = query("SELECT * FROM triage_health").iloc[0]
ops = query("SELECT * FROM issue_triage_health").iloc[0]
untriaged = query("SELECT issue_number, title, age_days, issue_url FROM oldest_untriaged")
workload = query("SELECT * FROM assignee_workload")
priorities = query("SELECT * FROM community_priorities ORDER BY reactions_total_count DESC")

net = int(summary["closed_4w"]) - int(summary["opened_4w"])
```

## Operational Triage
```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Slipped through (bugs)"
dict(value=int(ops["slipped_through_count"]), caption="zero triage signal", icon="exclamation-circle", color="danger")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Triage Queue"
dict(value=int(ops["triage_queue_count"]), icon="inbox", color="warning")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Hard Blockers"
dict(value=int(ops["hard_blocker_count"]), caption=f"{int(ops['hard_blocker_unreleased'])} unreleased", icon="shield-exclamation", color="danger")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Needs Repro"
dict(value=int(ops["needs_repro_count"]), icon="bug", color="warning")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Repro Verified"
dict(value=int(ops["repro_verified_count"]), icon="check-circle", color="success")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Stale (90d+)"
dict(value=int(ops["stale_count"]), icon="clock-history", color="secondary")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total Open"
dict(value=int(ops["total_open"]), icon="journal-text", color="primary")
```

### Oldest Untriaged Issues
Top 25 open non-EPIC issues with zero triage signal, ordered by age.

```{python}
#| title: "Oldest Untriaged"
untriaged
```

## Key Metrics
```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Open Issues"
dict(value=int(summary["open_issues"]), icon="journal-text", color="primary")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Net Flow (4 wk)"
dict(
    value=f"{'+' if net >= 0 else ''}{net}",
    icon="arrow-down-up",
    color="success" if net >= 0 else "danger",
)
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Median Close (4 wk)"
val = summary["rolling_median_close_days"]
dict(value=f"{val} days" if val else "N/A", icon="clock", color="secondary")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "48h Response SLA"
sla = summary["pct_responded_48h"]
dict(value=f"{int(sla)}%" if sla else "N/A", icon="bell", color="info")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Stale Issues (30d+)"
dict(value=int(summary["stale_count"]), icon="exclamation-triangle", color="warning")
```

## Cumulative Issue Flow
```{python}
cum_long = cum_flow.melt(
    id_vars="week",
    value_vars=["cumulative_opened", "cumulative_closed"],
    var_name="series",
    value_name="issues",
)
cum_long["series"] = cum_long["series"].map({"cumulative_opened": "opened", "cumulative_closed": "closed"})
chart({
    "data": {"values": records(cum_long)},
    "mark": {"type": "area", "opacity": 0.45, "line": True},
    "encoding": {
        "x": {"field": "week", "type": "temporal", "title": "Week"},
        "y": {"field": "issues", "type": "quantitative", "title": "Issues"},
        "color": {
            "field": "series",
            "type": "nominal",
            "scale": {"domain": ["opened", "closed"], "range": [PALETTE["opened"], PALETTE["closed"]]},
            "title": None,
        },
        "tooltip": [{"field": "week"}, {"field": "series"}, {"field": "issues"}],
    },
    "title": "Cumulative Issue Flow",
})
```

## Velocity & Response
```{python}
chart({
    "data": {"values": records(velocity)},
    "mark": {"type": "line", "point": True},
    "encoding": {
        "x": {"field": "week", "type": "temporal", "title": "Week"},
        "y": {"field": "median_days", "type": "quantitative", "title": "Median Days"},
        "color": {
            "field": "issue_category",
            "type": "nominal",
            "scale": {"domain": ["bug", "enhancement"], "range": [PALETTE["bug"], PALETTE["enhancement"]]},
            "title": "Type",
        },
        "tooltip": [{"field": "week"}, {"field": "issue_category"}, {"field": "median_days"}],
    },
    "title": "Median Days to Close: Bugs vs Enhancements",
})
```

```{python}
resp_long = resp.melt(
    id_vars="week",
    value_vars=["p25", "p50", "p75"],
    var_name="percentile",
    value_name="hours",
)
chart({
    "data": {"values": records(resp_long)},
    "mark": {"type": "line", "point": True},
    "encoding": {
        "x": {"field": "week", "type": "temporal", "title": "Week"},
        "y": {"field": "hours", "type": "quantitative", "title": "Hours"},
        "color": {
            "field": "percentile",
            "type": "nominal",
            "scale": {"domain": ["p25", "p50", "p75"], "range": [PALETTE["p25"], PALETTE["p50"], PALETTE["p75"]]},
            "title": None,
        },
        "tooltip": [{"field": "week"}, {"field": "percentile"}, {"field": "hours"}],
    },
    "title": "Time to First Response (hours)",
})
```

## Issue Distribution
```{python}
chart({
    "data": {"values": records(age_dist)},
    "mark": "bar",
    "encoding": {
        "x": {
            "field": "age_bucket",
            "type": "ordinal",
            "title": "Age",
            "sort": ["0-7d", "8-30d", "31-90d", "91-180d", "180d+"],
        },
        "y": {"field": "issue_count", "type": "quantitative", "title": "Issues", "stack": True},
        "color": {
            "field": "issue_category",
            "type": "nominal",
            "scale": {"domain": ["bug", "enhancement", "other"], "range": [PALETTE["bug"], PALETTE["enhancement"], PALETTE["other"]]},
            "title": "Type",
        },
        "tooltip": [{"field": "age_bucket"}, {"field": "issue_category"}, {"field": "issue_count"}],
    },
    "title": "Open Issue Age by Type",
})
```

```{python}
chart({
    "data": {"values": records(lbl)},
    "mark": "bar",
    "encoding": {
        "x": {"field": "median_days_to_close", "type": "quantitative", "title": "Median Days"},
        "y": {"field": "label_name", "type": "nominal", "title": None, "sort": "-x"},
        "tooltip": [{"field": "label_name"}, {"field": "median_days_to_close"}, {"field": "closed_count"}],
    },
    "title": "Median Days to Close by Label",
})
```

## Triage Health
```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "% Labeled"
dict(value=f"{int(triage['pct_labeled'])}%", icon="tag", color="primary")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "% Typed"
dict(value=f"{int(triage['pct_typed'])}%", icon="card-list", color="primary")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "% Assigned"
dict(value=f"{int(triage['pct_assigned'])}%", icon="person", color="primary")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "% Milestoned"
dict(value=f"{int(triage['pct_milestoned'])}%", icon="flag", color="primary")
```

## Workload & Priorities
```{python}
workload_long = workload.melt(
    id_vars="assignee_login",
    value_vars=["bugs", "enhancements"],
    var_name="type",
    value_name="issue_count",
)
chart({
    "data": {"values": records(workload_long)},
    "mark": "bar",
    "encoding": {
        "x": {"field": "issue_count", "type": "quantitative", "title": "Open Issues", "stack": True},
        "y": {"field": "assignee_login", "type": "nominal", "title": None, "sort": "-x"},
        "color": {
            "field": "type",
            "type": "nominal",
            "scale": {"domain": ["bugs", "enhancements"], "range": [PALETTE["bug"], PALETTE["enhancement"]]},
            "title": "Type",
        },
        "tooltip": [{"field": "assignee_login"}, {"field": "type"}, {"field": "issue_count"}],
    },
    "title": "Open Issues by Assignee",
})
```

```{python}
#| title: "Community Priorities"
priorities[["issue_number", "title", "issue_category", "reactions_total_count", "age_days"]].rename(
    columns={
        "issue_number": "#",
        "title": "Title",
        "issue_category": "Type",
        "reactions_total_count": "Reactions",
        "age_days": "Age (days)",
    }
)
```
